headline: Global week ahead: Crude diplomacy casts shadow over Trump-Xi summit
summary: A quiet power play to build up strategic oil reserves changes the energy dynamic between China and the U.S. ahead of the Beijing summit in May.

raw.headline: Global week ahead: Crude diplomacy casts shadow over Trump-Xi summit
raw.summary: A quiet power play to build up strategic oil reserves changes the energy dynamic between China and the U.S. ahead of the Beijing summit in May.

headline: Aaron Levie Says AI Agents Will Make Work More Accessible While Giving Experts A 'Huge Edge'
summary: Aaron Levie says AI agents will democratize complex work but increase demand for experts and skilled professionals.

raw.headline: Aaron Levie Says AI Agents Will Make Work More Accessible While Giving Experts A 'Huge Edge'

headline: Qualcomm CEO Says OpenAI, Meta Are Working On AI Wearables That Could Replace Smartphones
summary: Qualcomm CEO says AI wearables with OpenAI and Meta could replace smartphones, shifting control from apps to AI agents in a new device era.

raw.headline: Qualcomm CEO Says OpenAI, Meta Are Working On AI Wearables That Could Replace Smartphones
